title: Figure 4 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Amphisphaeria sanpakiaensis (MFLU 26-0121, holotype). a. Substrate; b. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); c, d. Vertical sections through ascomata; e. Peridium; f. Paraphyses; g–j. Asci; k. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; l–t. Ascospores (t in Indian ink). Scale bars: 1 cm (a); 100 μm (c, d); 50 μm (g–j); 20 μm (e); 10 μm (f, l–t); 5 μm (k).
